evals.expected_output: A generated TSX component at src/text-highlights/ with correct line coordinates, registered in Root.tsx

assertions.text: A .tsx component file was created in src/text-highlights/
Root.tsx contains a <Composition> entry for the new component
The generated TSX defines exactly 4 highlight lines
TSX uses useCurrentFrame, spring, and staticFile from remotion

evals.prompt: I have this screenshot at public/tweet_sample.png — can you make the second paragraph stand out with a highlight animation?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs detect first to show lines, identifies the second paragraph, then generates TSX with correct range

assertions.text: A .tsx component file was created in src/text-highlights/
Root.tsx contains a <Composition> entry for the new component
Agent ran OCR detection before generating to identify paragraph boundaries
Highlighted lines correspond to a coherent paragraph, not random lines

evals.prompt: make a highlight animation on public/blog-screenshot.png but use a yellow marker style instead of the default, highlight lines 13-16
evals.expected_output: Generated TSX using marker mode with yellow color, opacity ~0.45, blendMode normal

assertions.text: A .tsx component file was created in src/text-highlights/
Root.tsx contains a <Composition> entry for the new component
TSX uses normal blend mode (marker style), not difference (invert)
TSX uses a yellow-ish highlight color like #FFE066
The generated TSX defines exactly 4 highlight lines (lines 13-16)
